hero.title: Full Stack Developer
hero.description: I enjoy building clear, reliable solutions and creating interfaces that feel good to use.

about.title: About Me
about.description: I'm a full stack developer specializing in Angular and .NET. I enjoy building scalable applications and solving complex challenges through elegant solutions. My passion lies in crafting seamless user experiences backed by solid architecture.

projects.title: Projects
projects.restoflowDescription: A full-stack restaurant management system developed as a diploma project. The platform includes an admin panel for managing menus, tables, and staff, as well as dedicated interfaces for waiters and chefs to track orders and statuses in real time. The system supports light and dark themes, multi-language functionality, and is integrated with both a backend service and a mobile application. Built collaboratively as part of a team project.

student.title: Student / Trainee Frontend Developer
student.description: Started my journey into software development while studying. Learned the fundamentals of web development and began working with Angular, state management, and modern frontend practices.

juniorFullstack.title: Junior Fullstack Developer
juniorFullstack.description: Worked as a junior fullstack developer, building and maintaining enterprise applications. Started as a frontend developer implementing new features and optimizing performance, then transitioned to fullstack development. Responsibilities included developing scalable Angular applications with advanced UI components, creating robust APIs and business logic using .NET and Entity Framework, and integrating SIP-based communication solutions.

fullstackDevops.title: Fullstack Developer
fullstackDevops.description: Currently working as a fullstack developer with DevOps responsibilities. Developing scalable web applications using Angular and .NET, while also managing infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, cloud deployments, and containerization. Working on both frontend and backend development, ensuring high performance and reliability of applications.
